overview.description: The WisdomTree U.S. Short Term Corporate Bond Fund (QSIG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index composed of investment grade, short-term, US bonds. Constituents are selected and weighted by fundamental company and bond risk characteristics. QSIG was launched on Apr 27, 2016 and is issued by WisdomTree.
infoTable: WisdomTree Fundamental U.S. Short-term Corporate Bond Index
